title: East Is West
writer: John B. Hymer, Frances Marion, Samuel Shipman
actors: Constance Talmadge, Edmund Burns, E. Alyn Warren
plot: Ming Toy, the eldest of Hop Toy's many children, is rescued from the auction blocks by Billy Benson and sent to the United States in the care of Lo Sang Kee. There she continues her interest in western ways and attracts attention ...
